code: import api from"./api";/** Public + admin read — grouped by layout */export const getHeroSlides=async()=>(await api.get("/hero")).data;export const createHeroSlide=async formData=>{const res=await api.post("/hero",formData);return res.data;};export const updateHeroSlide=async(id,formData)=>{const res=await api.patch(`/hero/${id}`,formData);return res.data;};export const deleteHeroSlide=async id=>(await api.delete(`/hero/${id}`)).data;
